title: Artificial Pine Branches 50Pcs Christmas Tree Picks Green Plants Pine Needles for DIY Garland Wreath Christmas Embellishing and Home Garden Decor
features: 【Artificial Pine Branches Material】:This Christmas artificial pine picks are made of quality plastic blend with flexible wire as the stem.The lifelike green color and vivid stereoscopic sense which make these pine branches looks like real.

【Realistic Christmas Pine Picks】: This life size artificial pine branches will always look fresh and full of life just like the real thing. It will always be fresh with no rotting and needs no maintenance.This artificial pine picks looks lifelike and realistic,adding more Christmas atmosphere.
【Package Including&Size】:Each package includes 50Pcs green pine branches,each pine pick is 27cm on height and 9cm on width.Perfect size for your DIY holiday season decor.

【Easy to Use Pine Picks】:The iron wire of the artificial pine branches is a flexible wire which can be twisted and rotated according to your requirement. You can DIY these pine picks any shape you want.Very easy and practical artificial pine picks.

【Adorable Christmas Decors】:These cute Christmas pine branches are ideal for holiday and Christmas decoration, wedding, party, wreaths, crafting projects, holiday floral arrangements.Vivid color and chic appearance can satisfy your pursuit of beauty, actually it is a genius idea to highlight festival and Christmas atmosphere.
description: Product Description Homcomodar Artifcial Christmas Pine Picks
